array_types.name: CR1_DEAT_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type CR1_DEAT_Field_Array is array (0 .. 4) of Boolean
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 5;

array_types.name: CR1_DEDT_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type CR1_DEDT_Field_Array is array (0 .. 4) of Boolean
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 5;

array_types.name: CR2_ABRMOD_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type CR2_ABRMOD_Field_Array is array (0 .. 1) of Boolean
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 2;
